nl_description: Fetch an RSS feed, filter articles that mention 'AI', and send matching titles to a Slack channel.

key_behaviors: Fetches RSS feed from a URL

nl_description: Read a CSV file of transactions, convert amounts from USD to EUR using a fixed rate, and write the result to a new CSV.
Tail a web server access log, parse each line into structured request objects with method/path/status, and append a summary row to a daily report spreadsheet.

key_behaviors: Parses log lines into structured request objects

nl_description: Watch a folder for new image uploads, resize each image to a 256x256 thumbnail, and upload the thumbnail to an S3 bucket.
Receive a DNS query, look up the domain in an authoritative nameserver, cache the result with TTL, and return the resolved IP to the client.

key_behaviors: Looks up domain against authoritative nameserver

nl_description: Watch a directory of Markdown files for changes, render each changed file to HTML with syntax highlighting, and deploy the updated pages to a static hosting bucket.

key_behaviors: Renders Markdown to HTML with syntax highlighting

nl_description: Watch an email inbox. Classify each email as urgent, newsletter, or other. Route urgent emails to a priority list, newsletters to a weekly digest, and count the rest by sender.

Read a temperature sensor value from an IoT gateway. Simultaneously push the reading to a time-series database, update a real-time dashboard widget, and check if it exceeds a threshold to trigger an HVAC adjustment.

key_behaviors: Checks threshold and triggers HVAC adjustment

nl_description: When a new e-commerce order arrives, simultaneously reserve inventory in the warehouse system, charge the customer's payment method, and send an order confirmation email.
When a video is uploaded, simultaneously extract a thumbnail at the 5-second mark, generate a text transcript via speech-to-text, and create a low-resolution preview for mobile clients.

When a CI/CD pipeline completes a build, simultaneously push the Docker image to a container registry, update the deployment manifest in the GitOps repo, send a Slack notification to the team, and tag the Git commit with the release version.

key_behaviors: Tags Git commit with release version

nl_description: Fetch today's weather forecast, my calendar events, and current traffic conditions. Combine them into a single morning briefing message.

key_behaviors: Combines all three into one briefing

nl_description: Pull a patient's lab results from the LIMS, current medications from the pharmacy system, and recent vitals from the nursing station. Merge them into a single pre-visit summary for the physician.

key_behaviors: Fetches current medications from pharmacy system
Fetches recent vitals from nursing station

nl_description: Collect mentions of a brand from Twitter, Reddit, and Hacker News simultaneously. Aggregate all mentions into a unified sentiment score with source attribution.

key_behaviors: Collects brand mentions from Hacker News
Aggregates into unified sentiment score with attribution

nl_description: For each credit card transaction, simultaneously check the IP geolocation, the card's velocity history, and the merchant risk category. Combine these signals into a single fraud risk score.

key_behaviors: Combines signals into fraud risk score

nl_description: Poll CPU utilization from the compute fleet, memory pressure from the memory monitor, and disk I/O latency from the storage layer. Combine into a single infrastructure health index and publish it to the ops dashboard.

key_behaviors: Fetches CPU utilization from compute fleet
Combines into health index and publishes to dashboard

nl_description: Receive a JSON payload. In parallel: validate the schema and normalize field names. After both complete, merge the validation report with the normalized data and store the result.

key_behaviors: Runs validation and normalization in parallel

nl_description: Receive an uploaded photo. In parallel: run an image classification model to generate tags and apply a watermark overlay. After both complete, combine the tagged metadata with the watermarked image and save to the content library.

key_behaviors: Combines tagged metadata with watermarked image

nl_description: Receive a loan application. In parallel: pull the applicant's credit score and verify their employment history. After both complete, merge the results into an underwriting decision and notify the applicant.

Receive a blog post draft. In parallel: run a spell/grammar check and generate an SEO metadata summary. After both complete, merge the corrected text with the SEO metadata and publish the final post to the CMS.

key_behaviors: Merges corrected text with SEO metadata

nl_description: Receive a shipment request. In parallel: calculate the optimal carrier rate and generate a customs declaration form. After both complete, merge carrier details with customs docs into a final shipping label and queue for dispatch.

key_behaviors: Merges carrier details with customs docs into shipping label

nl_description: Receive a stream of temperature sensor readings. Maintain a running average over the last 10 readings. When the average exceeds 80°F, emit an alert.

Track incoming API requests per client IP. Maintain a count of requests within a 60-second sliding window. If a client exceeds 100 requests in that window, reject subsequent requests with a 429 status until the window resets.

key_behaviors: Tracks per-IP request count in sliding window

nl_description: Maintain a shopping cart that accumulates add/remove item events. After each event, recompute the cart total including tax and shipping estimates, and push the updated cart summary to the frontend.

key_behaviors: Recomputes total with tax and shipping
Pushes updated cart summary to frontend

nl_description: Receive a stream of game score events from multiple players. Maintain a sorted top-10 leaderboard. When the leaderboard changes, broadcast the updated rankings to all connected clients.

key_behaviors: Receives game score events from multiple players
Broadcasts updated rankings to connected clients

nl_description: Call an external pricing API. If it fails, retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff. If all retries fail, fall back to a cached price. Log all attempts.

key_behaviors: Retries up to 3 times with backoff
Falls back to cache on exhaustion

nl_description: Send requests to a downstream payment gateway. Track failure rate over a 30-second window. When failures exceed 50%, open a circuit breaker that short-circuits to a degraded response. After 10 seconds, allow a single probe request to test recovery.

key_behaviors: Opens circuit breaker at 50% failure rate
Returns degraded response when circuit is open

nl_description: Consume messages from a job queue. Attempt to process each message. If processing fails after 2 retries, move the message to a dead-letter queue and send an alert to the ops channel with the failure reason.

key_behaviors: Retries failed messages up to 2 times
Moves exhausted failures to dead-letter queue
Alerts ops channel with failure reason

nl_description: Monitor a metrics stream. When error rate crosses 5%, simultaneously: send a PagerDuty alert, log to audit trail, and update a status dashboard. Each side effect must complete independently.

key_behaviors: Monitors error rate from metrics stream
Side effects are independent (one failing doesn't block others)

nl_description: When a new user signs up, validate their email format, then in sequence: create a database record, send a welcome email with a verification link, enqueue an analytics event, and provision a default workspace. If any step fails, log the failure and continue with remaining steps.

key_behaviors: Creates database record for new user
Sends welcome email with verification link
Logs and continues on individual step failure
